content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (May 27, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on May 27 focused on hardening security and compliance, improving runtime reliability, and integrating community-driven ecosystem plugins. The team prioritized SOC2 verification controls and robust error handling across agent connectors, while simultaneously processing a wave of new community-led initiatives for DeFi, compliance, and agent identity.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Security and Compliance Hardening**
*   Enhanced SOC2 verification controls, including updates to schemas, workflow pinning, Kubernetes workload checks, and Gitleaks scanning ([#8014](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8014)).
*   Audited and improved error handling for silent catch blocks, ensuring connector configuration failures are logged loudly and providing structured context for auth bridge and native capability failures ([#8013](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8013)).

**Runtime and Role Management**
*   Fixed a role management bug where `ensureOwnerRole` failed to apply correctly because it executed before connectors populated the runtime worlds; the logic now correctly handles `WORLD_JOINED`/`WORLD_CONNECTED` events ([#8003](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8003)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Infrastructure & OS:** [#8021](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8021) (RISC-V GUI profile), [#8015](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8015) (Cloud bridge network fix).
*   **Runtime & Core:** [#8022](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8022) (Agent registry helper), [#8020](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8020) (Subagent grounding), [#8019](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8019) (Reply truncation recovery), [#8018](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8018) (Tool output preservation), [#8017](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8017) (Desktop FFI prewarm).
*   **Plugins:** [#8016](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8016) (Added @suedeai/plugin-suede).

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Community Plugin Ecosystem**
*   Integrated several community-led plugins: Solana transaction firewall ([#7938](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7938)), GBLIN Protocol treasury management ([#7939](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7939)), and AgentAudit AI for EU compliance ([#7974](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7974)).

**Agent Identity and Infrastructure**
*   Closed issues related to the Agent Identity Verification dApp ([#7884](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7884)) and the Nautilus Compass infrastructure project ([#8011](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8011)).

## NEW ISSUES
*   *No new issues were opened on this date.*

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   **Planner Meta-Narration Issue ([#7960](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7960)):** The planner occasionally meta-narrates tool results instead of outputting the actual data. A contributor (Rajathacharya24) has requested to work on this issue as of May 27.
